cases.title: First Presbyterian Church of Rowlett, Texas (Complaint) v. North Texas Presbytery (Re: Rev. C. Don Darling)

parties.complainant_or_appellant: First Presbyterian Church of Rowlett, Texas

cases.synopsis: The SJC docket listing for a complaint by First Presbyterian Church of Rowlett, Texas against North Texas Presbytery regarding Rev. C. Don Darling. The judgment (Exhibit A) is noted as approved, with the full text printed at 18-71, p. 162.

cases.title: First Presbyterian Church of Rowlett, Texas (Appeal) v. North Texas Presbytery (Re: Mr. and Mrs. Sean Jones)

parties.complainant_or_appellant: First Presbyterian Church of Rowlett, Texas

cases.synopsis: The SJC docket listing for an appeal by First Presbyterian Church of Rowlett, Texas against North Texas Presbytery regarding Mr. and Mrs. Sean Jones. The judgment (Exhibit B) is noted as approved, with the full text printed at 18-71, p. 165.

cases.title: Grace Covenant Church, Blacksburg, VA v. New River Presbytery
cases.synopsis: SJC docket listing for an appeal by Grace Covenant Church, Blacksburg, VA against New River Presbytery. The case had not yet been completed by the Commission at the time of the 18th GA report.
